description.value: Price 6,500 gp; Slot none; CL 6th; Weight â; Aura moderate divination DESCRIPTION This plume always bears ink, as though freshly drawn from an inkwell. EFFECTS Once per day, a character holding the quill can enter a trancelike state, automatically writing possible upcoming events. After 1 minute of uninterrupted writing, the writer chooses attack roll, saving throw, or skill check. The next time that day she attempts a roll of the chosen type, she rolls twice and takes the more favorable result. The next time that day she attempts a roll of one of the other types (for example, a saving throw or skill check if she initially chose attack roll ), she must roll twice and take the less favorable result. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,250 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells borrow fortune
